nuggets.headline: Pete Rango's family fled Colombia due to guerrilla persecution when he was 11
nuggets.text: Born in Bogota, Colombia, Pete Rango's early life took a dramatic turn when his family moved to Fairfax, VA, seeking refuge from guerrilla forces. He first developed his musical skills by teaching himself guitar at age nine after disagreements with his teacher, later moving to percussion in his school band. This challenging beginning laid the foundation for his driven approach to music.

source.title: Meet Pete Rango - Voyage MIA Magazine | Miami City Guide
source.quoteSnippet: I was born in Bogota, Colombia. My family then moved to Fairfax, VA when I was 11 because we were being persecuted by the guerrilla forces. I started teaching myself how to play guitar because I couldn’t get along with my teacher.

nuggets.imageCaption: Pete Rango plays bass with a keyboard nearby.

nuggets.headline: Pete Rango landed a song on HBO's "Insecure"
nuggets.text: Beyond his own releases, Pete Rango has a strong track record of sync placements, with his music appearing in prominent TV shows. A notable placement was his song "Vi$ions," featuring Cherele, which was featured on HBO's hit series "Insecure." His work has also been heard on shows like HBO Max's "Rap Sh!t" and BET's "Tyler Perry's Sistas".

source.title: Pete Rango
source.quoteSnippet: HBO Insecure - Season 1 Episode 6View... Rap Sh!t - HBO Max Season 2View... Tyler Perry's Sistas - BETView

nuggets.imageCaption: Oms at Play by Pete Rango

nuggets.headline: Pete Rango's primary production partner is Parris Pierce
nuggets.text: If you're digging this track right now, you should definitely check out Parris Pierce. Pete Rango has collaborated extensively with Parris Pierce, referring to him as his "main production partner". Together, they even won i-Standard’s Music Producers competition in Miami, which led to sessions with other artists and placements. Their shared creative vision has been instrumental in shaping many of Pete Rango's projects.

source.title: Meet Pete Rango - Voyage MIA Magazine | Miami City Guide
source.quoteSnippet: One of PayUp’s producer was Parris Pierce. Parris has been one of my main production partners ever since. Parris and I competed in i-Standard’s Music Producers competition twice, once in ATL and second time in Miami. We ended up winning the competition in Miami...

nuggets.imageCaption: Producer Parris Pierce, frequent collaborator with Pete Rango.

artistSummary: Pete Rango is a music producer and creative director whose origins trace back to Bogota, Colombia. His career is marked by a deep interest in human psychology, artist development, and a versatile approach to music production and live audio engineering.
